cards.title: Data Structures
cards.governance_note: Document what the structure makes easy, hard, visible, and hidden.

cards.title: Operation Fit
cards.governance_note: Choose structures based on dominant operations and problem shape.

cards.title: Structure Invariants
cards.governance_note: State and preserve invariants required for valid structure.

cards.title: Representation Risk
cards.governance_note: Audit flattening, hidden priority, false hierarchy, opaque similarity, and relationship overclaim.
